P1.description: Critical — direct business or safety impact

P2.description: High — significant productivity impact or potential risk

escalation_paths.description: Account provisioning, permission grants, access revocation, offboarding

handles: Standard access provisioning (Jira, Confluence, Slack, VPN)
HID badge access for non-secure areas
GitHub org membership and repo access

automatic_actions: All access changes logged in the IT audit trail
Manager notified by email of any access granted or revoked
Offboarding triggers automated Okta account disable

escalation_paths.description: Phishing, suspected breach, ransomware, stolen devices, suspicious logins, SEV1/SEV2/SEV3 security events

handles: All security incidents at all severity levels
Immediate containment actions (session revocation, device isolation)
SEV1 and SEV2 incidents requiring engineering response
Confirmed data breach requiring customer or regulatory notification
Active compromise of prod-payments or Prism
Any incident potentially involving PII exfiltration

automatic_actions: SEV1: immediately page on-call Security and CISO via PagerDuty
SEV1: isolate affected device from network if possible
SEV1/SEV2: force-reset all credentials for affected accounts
Any incident: open Jira ticket in SECURITY project
PII exposure suspected: notify Legal automatically

escalation_paths.description: Device faults, peripheral issues, MDM enrollment, hardware requests and replacements

sla_overrides.P1: Safety hazards (swollen battery, structural damage): same-day collection and loaner
sla_overrides.P2: Business-blocking faults: same-day assessment, loaner if repair > 4 hours
sla_overrides.P3: Non-blocking hardware requests: 3-5 business day delivery

handles: Confirmed hardware faults requiring physical inspection
Device collection for repair or replacement
Warranty claims and Apple Authorized Service Provider coordination

automatic_actions: Log asset state change in hardware inventory system
Trigger AppleCare+ claim if device is within warranty and physically damaged
Issue loaner from IT spares if primary device out of action > 4 hours

escalation_paths.description: Application bugs, license renewals, installation failures, MDM-pushed software rollbacks

sla_overrides.P1: Business-blocking IDE or critical tool failure with active deadline: 1-hour response

handles: MDM software rollbacks (Slack, Zoom, Docker Desktop)
Docker Desktop kernel extension issues on M-series Macs
Internal developer tool issues (custom Veridian tooling)
Fleet-wide software regressions requiring vendor escalation

automatic_actions: If MFA factor is reset, issue 24-hour bypass code for critical apps
Fleet-wide Jamf rollback is triggered by IT Ops Lead approval only
Vendor support tickets opened for issues affecting > 5 employees

escalation_paths.description: New hire day-1 setup, account provisioning, device enrollment, role-specific access, Helix on-call setup

sla_overrides.P1: Day-1 blocking issues (no laptop, no Okta account): immediate response
sla_overrides.P2: Missing access preventing job function: 4-hour resolution on day 1

handles: Missing Okta account or SSO app access
Role-specific access (Nexus, Prism, AWS, GitHub) — requires manager to have submitted access requests
Helix on-call account setup (coordinated with SRE team lead)
Badge access for secure areas (server room, restricted floors)
Systemic onboarding failures (multiple new hires affected)
International hire setup requiring regional IT support
Onboarding checklist gaps requiring process change

automatic_actions: New hire ticket creation triggers IT onboarding checklist in Jira
Hiring manager notified if day-1 access is not confirmed by 10am on start date
People Ops notified of any onboarding delays > 4 hours

escalation_paths.description: Any incident or degradation affecting the prod-payments service — always P1

sla_overrides.P1: All payments incidents are P1. First response: 15 minutes. Containment target: 30 minutes. Resolution target: 2 hours.
sla_overrides.P2: Not applicable — all prod-payments incidents are auto-escalated to P1.
sla_overrides.P3: Not applicable — all prod-payments incidents are auto-escalated to P1.

handles: Pod restarts, config map rollbacks, traffic rerouting
Code-level investigation (N+1 queries, logic bugs, idempotency failures)
Regulatory notification if financial data is at risk

automatic_actions: Any prod-payments alert auto-pages SRE on-call and Payments lead via PagerDuty
SEV1 auto-creates a Jira incident in PAYMENTS project
SEV1 auto-posts to #incidents Slack channel with runbook link
Duplicate charges: auto-trigger Stripe refund script after engineer confirmation
Post-mortem mandatory for all incidents — template auto-attached to Jira ticket

escalation_paths.description: Home office equipment, ergonomics, software subscriptions, conference and L&D expenses

sla_overrides.P2: Time-sensitive procurement (contractor licenses, conference approaching): 24-hour response
sla_overrides.P3: Standard expense approvals: 2 business day response

handles: Home office equipment under $400 (self-approve in Expensify)
Monthly home internet stipend claims (fully remote employees)
Ergonomics accommodation requests (medically necessary equipment, any amount)

automatic_actions: Expensify auto-notifies manager for any expense over $400
Software subscription purchases not through IT procurement flagged for Finance review
Ergonomics accommodation request triggers People Ops workflow

escalation_paths.description: Policy questions, IT how-tos, redirects to People Ops or Facilities, misc non-incident queries

sla_overrides.P3: Best-effort response within 1 business day; most questions resolved by KB or redirect

handles: Jira project and process routing questions
WiFi, office network, and facilities questions

tiers.team: IT Ops / People Ops / Facilities (depending on topic)
handles: Redirects to People Ops (PTO, benefits, HR) or Facilities (parking, badge, building)

automatic_actions: HR-related questions (PTO, benefits, payroll) auto-routed to People Ops queue
Facilities-related questions (parking, building access, office logistics) auto-routed to Facilities queue
